title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
